title: What Women Want
wikitext:
[]: What Women Want!             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 6:38 am Yeallo all :o DirtyHamster's here to conduct a little experiment. I know that the female characters in Eva have been "studied" to death in forums like, which one is hotter etc. But how often have the male characters been "studied" So here's what I want ya'll ta do. Using ONLY the male characters from Eva (doesn't matter if they're major or minor characters) decide which one you think is the "hottest" or "sexiest". That way we can see how far off men are with thinking what women want. Oooh. If you could state with your answer if you're male of female, that would save a shit load of confusion. Right, here goes: I'm male (and straight) but if I had to pick the sexiest male character, I'd go with Gendo. I don't know why, he just seems to have that "something". Kaworu's good looking but he doesn't have that tone around him like Gendo. However, Kaji seems to be a "ladies man" but, I don't know. To me he looks like a cross between Gendo & Kaworu. Actually yeah. I bet you if Gendo & Kaworu somehow managed to "get it on" their kid would look like Kaji. They could call him "Bum Fluff Face" or something. Seriously. (Oh Oh. Is that Reichu I hear?) Reichu: That DirtyHamster is going to get such an ass kickin'. No one makes fun of my Kaji and gets away with it. Oooh oooh oooh. I know what my next Topic is gonna be. "If They Mated" :P

[]:             Quote Post by Oroboro » Sun May 29, 2005 6:56 am I'm also a straight male, but I would have to Kaji. He's just a smooth operator. Kaji's with that dishelved appearence and long hair just made him cool. Even though he was a ladies' man who like to mess around, he had serious side and could get the job done. Actually, he's the reason I grew my hair out two years back. I wanted to look cool, like him...soooo yeah :oops:... Gendo was a close second. Kaoru was third, because there are way too many fangirls who that that girl is hot. Shinji...he was dead last. Oooh oooh oooh. I know what my next Topic is gonna be. "If They Mated" :P

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 7:01 am Oroboro wrote: Shinji...he was dead last.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun May 29, 2005 7:11 am I'd go with Kaworu!I like romantic and philosophers ones.. Oh and there's a rumor that these kind of men are very good at....you know!

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 8:01 am I'm guessin' it's out of the question that you're gonna elaborate on that rumor......is it?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Sun May 29, 2005 8:07 am DirtyHamster wrote: I'm guessin' it's out of the question that you're gonna elaborate on that rumor......is it?

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 8:36 am What do ya mean what do I mean?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 29, 2005 10:20 am Since when was Kaji a ladies' man? Ever consider that his behavior could be his way of getting Misato's attention (which, in both of the cited instances, it most certainly did)? And, hmm yes, Kaji is definitely teh hawtest.

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 10:36 am Reichu wrote: Ever consider that his behavior could be his way of getting Misato's attention

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Sun May 29, 2005 11:30 am Pepens the sexiest male, you know he secretly holds sexy partys inside of his fridge!

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Sun May 29, 2005 11:39 am Pepens! :P Ahh, I can't give out to you. Just look at your signature. Respect.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun May 29, 2005 7:17 pm DirtyHamster wrote: Kaji always acted like a smooth operator, even up to his death. Whether Misato was in his presence or not had nothing to do with it.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun May 29, 2005 10:04 pm Reichu wrote: Are "smooth operator" and "ladies' man" the same thing?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Sun May 29, 2005 11:40 pm Kaworu by far, there's just no contest. He has almost as many fans as Rei; that's quite impressive for less than ten minutes of air time. He's the only character in the show that is completely open with his feelings (barring that whole 3I thing), he's the kindest character in the show, and he's cute to boot!

[]:             Quote Post by JinKazama » Mon May 30, 2005 12:24 am I'm male and straight and have to go with what DirtyHamster had said, Gendou is the sexist IMO, so is Kaji and Kaworu, but what seems to me they lack the mature side that Gendou had. ( hmm, and what about Shinji or Toji? I thought they could be sexy too. And I doubt that anyone would think Fuyutsuki is sexy, though he might have been back in the days he was with Gendou & Yui.) 8) and Has anyone here mentioned members of SEELE? they look cool though... 8)

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon May 30, 2005 6:16 am Dave wrote: Kaworu by far, there's just no contest. He has almost as many fans as Rei; that's quite impressive for less than ten minutes of air time. He's the only character in the show that is completely open with his feelings (barring that whole 3I thing), he's the kindest character in the show, and he's cute to boot!

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 30, 2005 7:04 am It seems that all the " Straight Male " members prefer Gendo ...edit... JinKazama wrote: and Has anyone here mentioned members of SEELE? they look cool though... 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon May 30, 2005 12:02 pm It seems that all the "Straight Male" members prefer Gendo Very Happy

[]:             Quote Post by DirtyHamster » Mon May 30, 2005 12:08 pm Sence when are you straight? I thought you liked Penguins.

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon May 30, 2005 12:24 pm Sence when are you straight? I thought you liked Penguins. Very Happy
